title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: 'Moment of Danger': Anthropic CEO Warns of Cyber Risk Window as AI Uncovers Software Flaws
summary: Experts warn that AI is exposing software bugs at scale, raising the risk of faster cyberattacks.

title: Tennessee Bankers Association names Stablecore as preferred digital asset provider
summary: Regional lenders gain access to infrastructure for stablecoins, tokenized deposits and crypto-backed lending without building systems in-house, signaling wider bank adoption.

title: OpenAI Just Upgraded ChatGPT's Default Model—Here's What GPT-5.5 Instant Actually Does
summary: GPT-5.5 Instant is now the default ChatGPT model. It makes fewer things up, answers more concisely, and finally remembers what you told it last week.

title: Iggy Azalea Faces Lawsuit Over Solana Meme Coin
summary: Investors allege the rapper misled buyers about the token’s real-world utility.

title: Bernstein cites $4T tokenized credit opportunity for Figure Technology stock
summary: Bernstein points to Figure’s expansion beyond home equity lending into blockchain-based credit, as tokenization begins to scale across broader loan markets.

title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
summary: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

title: US Government Will Vet Pre-Release AI Models From Google, xAI and Microsoft
summary: Google, Microsoft, and Elon Musk’s xAI have agreed to run their models by the U.S. government as Trump weighs an AI executive order.

title: Kaiko flags possible front-running before Robinhood token listings
summary: Kaiko said open interest, funding rates and wallet activity showed repeated pre-announcement positioning before several Robinhood token listings.

title: Europe should weigh tokenized SEPA payments, Bank of Italy official says
summary: The Bank of Italy’s deputy governor floated the evaluation of tokenized SEPA payments, as the ECB experiments with tokenized digital payment frameworks to avoid stablecoin competition.

title: Bullish to buy transfer agent Equiniti for $4.2B in tokenization push
summary: Bullish has agreed to acquire transfer agent Equiniti as more Wall Street participants accelerate their tokenization initiatives to offer 24/7 trading.
